text.title: llamaindex-indexes-queries Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-indexes-queries with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: VectorStoreIndex used for multi-hop reasoning gives shallow answers
antipattern.root-cause: Wrong index choice; vector retrieval can't follow entity links.
antipattern.fix: Switch to KnowledgeGraphIndex when hops >1; or wire a sub_question_query_engine.
antipattern.detector: Run a multi-hop eval; if recall drops, index is wrong.

antipattern.fix: Cap num_sub_questions=4-6; budget by question complexity.

antipattern.symptom: Tree summarisation produces hallucinations on leaf merge
antipattern.root-cause: Default response_synthesizer used; no citation pressure.
antipattern.fix: Use response_mode='refine' or 'compact_accumulate' with cite-evidence prompts.

antipattern.root-cause: Pure keyword extraction; vector signal needed.
